lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਦੀ ਭਿਤਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਕੈ ਸਭਿ ਆਇ ਪਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪੈਰੀ ਲਾਹਿਓਨੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਿਅਹੁ ਮਨਹੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: paudee bhit dekh kai sabh aae pe satigur kee pairee laahion sabhanaa kiahu manahu gumaan |10|
lines.english: Seeing the food being distributed, everyone came and fell at the feet of the True Guru, who cleansed the minds of all of their egotistical pride. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੈ ਵਲਿ ਹੋਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kai val hoaa meraa suaamee har sajan purakh sujaan |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is on the side of servant Nanak. The All-powerful and All-knowing Lord God is my Best Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਵਾਹੇ ਕੋ ਲੁਣੈ ਕੋ ਪਾਏ ਖਲਿਹਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: koee vaahe ko lunai ko paae khalihaan |
lines.english: One plants the seed, another harvests the crop, and still another beats the grain from the chaff.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਵ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਕੋਈ ਖਾਇ ਨਿਦਾਨਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ev na jaapee koee khaae nidaan |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, it is not known, who will ultimately eat the grain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਤਰਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis man vasiaa tariaa soe |
lines.english: He alone is carried across, within whose mind the Lord abides.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jo bhaavai so hoe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that alone happens, which is pleasing to His Will. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਦਇਆਲਿ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham deaal saagar taariaa |
lines.english: The Merciful Supreme Lord God has carried me across the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai miharavaan bharam bhau maariaa |
lines.english: The compassionate perfect Guru has eradicated my doubts and fears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਕੰਠਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam nidhaan kantth ur dhaariaa |
lines.english: I have enshrined the treasure of the Ambrosial Naam within my throat and heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਬਿਕਰਾਲੁ ਦੂਤ ਸਭਿ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh bikaraal doot sabh haariaa |
lines.english: Unsatisfied sexual desire and unresolved anger, the horrible demons, have been totally destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਕੂੜੇ ਕਹਣ ਕਹੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee naam visaariaa koorre kehan kahana |
lines.english: Those who forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are said to be false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saadhoo sang janam maran savaariaa |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, my birth and death have been adorned and redeemed. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਮੁਠੇ ਦੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: saakat mutthe duramatee har ras na jaanana |
lines.english: The faithless cynics are defrauded by their own evil-mindedness; they do not know the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਚੋਰ ਤਿਨਾ ਘਰੁ ਮੁਹਨੑਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: panch chor tinaa ghar muhana haumai andar sana |
lines.english: The five thieves plunder their homes, and egotism breaks in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਲੁਟਾਇਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਸਿਉ ਰਚਹਿ ਰਚੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee amrit bharam luttaaeaa bikh siau racheh rachana |
lines.english: Those who lose the Ambrosial Nectar through doubt, remain engrossed and entangled in corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਟਾ ਸੇਤੀ ਪਿਰਹੜੀ ਜਨ ਸਿਉ ਵਾਦੁ ਕਰੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: dusattaa setee piraharree jan siau vaad karana |
lines.english: They make friends with the wicked, and argue with the humble servants of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਜਿਵ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਵੈ ਰਹੰਨੑਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: peiai kirat kamaavade jiv raakheh tivai rahana |1|
lines.english: They act according to the karma of the actions they committed before; as the Lord keeps them, so do they live. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰਕ ਮਹਿ ਜਮਿ ਬਧੇ ਦੁਖ ਸਹੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak saakat narak meh jam badhe dukh sahana |
lines.english: O Nanak, the faithless cynics are bound and gagged by the Messenger of Death, and suffer agony in hell.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: saas giraas sadaa man vasai jam johi na sakai tis |
lines.english: With every breath and morsel of food, the Lord abides in their minds forever, and the Messenger of Death cannot even see them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਾਣੁ ਨਿਤਾਣੇ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee satigur seviaa taan nitaane tis |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru, are transformed from powerless into powerful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਕਵਲਾ ਸੇਵਕਿ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai har har naam ras kavalaa sevak tis |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, fills their hearts, and Maya is their servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਾਸਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਪਰਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: har daasaa kaa daas hoe param padaarath tis |
lines.english: One who becomes the slave of the Lord's slaves, obtains the greatest treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਵਸੈ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੈ ਤਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak man tan jis prabh vasai hau sad kurabaanai tis |
lines.english: O Nanak, I am forever a sacrifice to that one, within whose mind and body God dwells.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਰਸੁ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਸਿਉ ਤਿਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jina kau poorab likhiaa ras sant janaa siau tis |2|
lines.english: One who has such pre-ordained destiny, he alone is in love with the humble Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬੋਲੇ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਸੋ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਸੁਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo bole pooraa satiguroo so paramesar suniaa |
lines.english: Whatever the Perfect True Guru says, the Transcendent Lord hears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਵਰਤਿਆ ਜਗਤ ਮਹਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: soee varatiaa jagat meh ghatt ghatt mukh bhaniaa |
lines.english: It pervades and permeates the whole world, and it is on the mouth of each and every being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਸਾਹਿਬੈ ਨਹ ਜਾਹੀ ਗਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: bahut vaddiaaeea saahibai neh jaahee ganeea |
lines.english: So numerous are the great glories of the Lord, they cannot even be counted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਹਜੁ ਅਨਦੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪਾਸਿ ਸਚੀ ਗੁਰ ਮਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sach sehaj anad satiguroo paas sachee gur maneea |
lines.english: Truth, poise and bliss rest in the True Guru; the Guru bestows the jewel of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਸਚੇ ਜਿਉ ਬਣਿਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sant savaare paarabraham sache jiau baniaa |12|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Supreme Lord God embellishes the Saints, who become like the True Lord. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਵਿਸਰੀ ਕਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa visaree kiau man rahai hajoor |
lines.english: He forgets to serve the Guru; how can his mind remain in the Lord's Presence?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਝੂਠੈ ਲਾਲਚਿ ਕੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh janam gavaaeaa jhootthai laalach koor |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh wastes away his life in worthless greed and falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: apanaa aap na pachhaanee har prabh jaataa door |
lines.english: He does not understand himself; he believes the Lord God to be far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bakhas milaaeian sachai sabad hadoor |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord forgives, and blends them with Himself; through the True Word of the Shabad, He is ever-present. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh sachaa sohilaa guramukh naam govind |
lines.english: True is the Praise of the Lord God; the Gurmukh chants the Name of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naam salaahanaa har japiaa man aanand |
lines.english: Praising the Naam night and day, and meditating on the Lord, the mind becomes blissful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿਆ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਭੰਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam salaahiaa bahurr na man tan bhang |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak praises the Naam; his mind and body shall never again be shattered. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee har paaeaa pooran paramaanand |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I have found the Lord, the perfect embodiment of supreme bliss.
